results.title: The Florida Project
results.overview: The story of a precocious six year-old and her ragtag group of friends whose summer break is filled with childhood wonder, possibility and a sense of adventure while the adults around them struggle with hard times.

results.title: Under the Rainbow: Making The Florida Project
results.original_title: Under the Rainbow: Making The Florida Project
results.overview: An interesting featurette which has some good behind the scenes footage, including early location scouting, table reads and interactions with the often near out of control kids.

results.title: EPCOT
results.overview: A promotional short film hosted by Walt Disney, filmed on October 27, 1966, less than two months before his death. Here he details plans for the "Florida Project," later known as Disney World, and how his EPCOT concept will be integrated into it.
